title: How we build
subtitle: Six principles that guide every product—ours and yours. The same practices we use on our own SaaS apply to client work.

cards.title: Keep it simple
cards.text: Clear systems are easier for your users to adopt, for your team to operate, and for us to extend over time.

cards.title: Build for reliability
cards.text: We design for production from day one: sensible architecture, testing, releases, and observability where it matters.

cards.title: Solve real problems
cards.text: Every feature ties to a business or user outcome we can name—no busywork disguised as progress.

cards.title: Think long term
cards.text: We favour patterns you can grow into, not demos you will throw away in six months.

cards.title: Ship with discipline
cards.text: Milestones, demos, and written scope so you always know what is shipping next and why.

cards.title: Own the result
cards.text: Documentation, handover, and post-launch support so the product keeps delivering after launch.
